content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Hanoi Factory". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/777/problem/E
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of disks. The next line contains n integers representing the initial state of the disks.
content.outputFormat: The minimum number of moves required to solve the Tower of Hanoi problem.

solution.approach: Use a recursive approach to solve the Tower of Hanoi problem.
